summary: Comprehensive regression test of all Doula and Midwife provider features after shared component refactoring. All 5 provider screens (Dashboard, Messages, Invoices, Clients, Profile) verified for both roles. Backend APIs 100% passing, Frontend UI 100% verified.

issues: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warnings - minor, cosmetic only

doula_flow.dashboard: PASS - Stats (Active Clients: 2, Upcoming Appts, Pending Contracts, Pending Invoices), Quick Actions (See Clients, New Contract, New Invoice, Appointments), Doula Tip section all visible
doula_flow.clients: PASS - My Clients page with Active Clients (2), Message and Birth Plan buttons on client cards
doula_flow.messages: PASS - Messages page with conversation list (Test Mom Msg)
doula_flow.invoices: PASS - Invoices page with status filters (All, Draft, Sent, Paid, Cancelled)
doula_flow.profile: PASS - All 4 sections (Practice Info, Video Intro, More About Me, Subscription), Lavender Doula badge, Log Out button
doula_flow.profile_edit: PASS - Zip Code field visible (Doula-specific), Credentials NOT visible (correct)
doula_flow.contracts: PASS - Contracts page with contract list

midwife_flow.dashboard: PASS - Stats (Prenatal Clients: 1, Upcoming Appts, Visits This Month, Births This Month), Quick Actions (Add Client, Add Visit, Birth Summary, Appointments), Midwifery Tools section all visible
midwife_flow.clients: PASS - My Clients page with Active Clients (1), Prenatal Visits button visible (Midwife-specific)
midwife_flow.client_detail: PASS - Client detail page (Jane Test Mom) with Prenatal Visits section, visit data visible (BP, FHR, FH, Wt)
midwife_flow.messages: PASS - Messages page with empty state
midwife_flow.invoices: PASS - Invoices page with status filters (All, Draft, Sent, Paid, Cancelled)
midwife_flow.profile: PASS - All 4 sections visible, Green Midwife badge, Credentials field showing 'CPM' (Midwife-specific)
midwife_flow.profile_edit: PASS - Credentials input visible (Midwife-specific), Accepting New Clients toggle, Zip Code NOT visible (correct)
midwife_flow.contracts: PASS - Contracts page with contract list (Draft, Sent, Signed statuses)

critical_code_review_comments: All 10 provider screens using 5 shared components working correctly
Role-specific fields verified: Doula=Zip Code, Midwife=Credentials
Client navigation for Midwife includes Prenatal Visits button (fixed bug)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Doula and Midwife provider screens fully verified. Shared component refactoring successful. Role-specific fields (Doula: Zip Code lookup, Midwife: Credentials) working correctly. Client detail navigation for Midwife with Prenatal Visits feature verified. All API endpoints return 200 status.
